# Align generated GitHub label taxonomy with repository metadata

Epic: `DX-001` — Developer experience and release hardening

Labels: type:automation, type:repo-automation, phase:hardening, status:implemented

Status: `implemented`

## Background

This issue was generated from `conductor/backlog.yml`; the criteria below are the track-specific acceptance contract.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Generated issue labels have corresponding repository labels with descriptions.
- [ ] The reconciled issue set carries the generated labels without changing issue content.
- [ ] Label taxonomy alignment is recorded as an auditable Conductor session.
